channel.title: Technology on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Technology on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: From CRM App to LLM Knowledge Base: A Markdown-Native CRM for the Agent Era
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Exploring the shift from traditional CRM software to LLM-maintained knowledge bases, where structured markdown files serve as the system of record for the agent era.

item.title: The Predictive Web: What a 2001 Lecture Taught Me About the Future of AI
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: James Burke’s 2001 lecture predicted the ‘Knowledge Web’ and the transition from reductionism to connection. Decades later, Generative AI and Agentic systems are making this vision a reality.

item.title: Context Hub vs. Context7: Revolutionizing AI Coding with Accurate Documentation
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A comparison of Context Hub and Context7, two emerging tools designed to provide AI coding agents with accurate, up-to-date documentation and reduce hallucinations.

item.title: The Mechanics of Institutional-Grade Innovation: Structuring This Platform
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An operational breakdown of the CEO Playbook brand architecture and how its structure reflects the rigor of institutional-grade venture building.

item.title: Cyber Resilience on the Board Agenda
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: In this panel discussion, John Januszczak joins experts to reframe cyber resilience from a technical expense to a strategic enabler. John highlights how resilience serves as a proxy for management quality and is essential for ensuring revenue continuity in the digital age.

item.title: From Discovery to Knowledge
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: GenAI is to software development what LiDAR is to archaeology: exceptional at discovery, insufficient for knowledge. The real value still lies in human judgment, context, and accountability.

item.title: Designing Around Constraints
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Explains why Git stores loose objects in 256 subdirectories keyed by the first two hash characters and how that simple layout optimizes filesystem performance and scalability.

item.title: The NPM Supply Chain Attack: A Wake-Up Call for Digital Infrastructure
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: An analysis of the recent NPM supply chain attack, its implications for global digital infrastructure, and the urgent need for enhanced security in open-source ecosystems.

item.title: Creating R Packages: What You Need to Know
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Key lessons and impressions from authoring an R Package, with essential resources for starting your own.

item.title: Simulation Standard for Business Process Management
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A foundational proposal arguing that while BPMN standardized process ‘flows’, the industry lacked a standard for the ‘physics’ of simulation—resources, costs, and time.
